# SAI Social

> SAI Social is a UK performance-marketing agency for hospitality and nightlife. We build a demand engine — paid ads, short-form content and a booking funnel — that fills bars, clubs, restaurants and events. Every campaign is judged on one metric: bodies through the door, not impressions.

Placeholder domain below is https://www.saisocial.co.uk — update once the live domain is set.

## What we do
- Meta Paid Ads (Facebook & Instagram): geo-targeted, event/booking/guest-list campaigns, retargeting.
- Google & Search Ads: intent capture, Google Maps/local pack, call & reservation tracking, Performance Max.
- Reels & Short-Form Content: on-site shoots, weekly Reels/Stories engineered for reach.
- TikTok Content: trend-led native edits, local For You Page targeting.
- Promoter & Influencer Marketing: vetted local creator network, guest-list management, attribution.
- Websites & Booking Funnels: fast venue sites with integrated booking/waitlist/ticketing, tracked end to end.
- Local SEO & Listings: Google Business Profile optimisation, review generation, local citations.

## Who it's for
UK bars, cocktail bars, nightclubs, restaurants, members' clubs, and events/festivals. Owner-operated or small-group venues. Serves the United Kingdom.

## Pricing (monthly retainer, GBP)
- Foundation — £1,000–1,500/mo — lock down Google profile, reviews and booking flow.
- Growth — £2,000–2,500/mo — content + targeted paid ads tied to real offers.
- Full Stack — £3,000–3,500/mo — complete multi-channel engine (ads, content, funnels).

Free: a 2-minute growth audit (scores a venue out of 20, no email required) and a free growth teardown within 24 hours of enquiry.

## Proof
- Akbar's Glasgow (restaurant, 90 days): +62% weeknight covers, 3.1× return on ad spend, −34% cost per booking — filled quiet midweek tables without discounting the brand.
